ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, or 3rd class) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sib_sp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 = did not survive, 1 = survived) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the passenger (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Miss) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the cabin was located */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for family groups */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin FOREIGN KEY ("cabin") REFERENCES cabin_details ("cabin_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket FOREIGN KEY ("ticket") REFERENCES ticket_details ("ticket_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_details" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class associated with the ticket */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., single, family, group) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_details" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class associated with the cabin */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the cabin is located */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation port */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code of the embarkation port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_records" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 = did not survive, 1 = survived) */,
  "lifeboat_number" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if the passenger was rescued */,
  "rescue_time" TEXT /* Time when the passenger was rescued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_records_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
